languages.text: "Беру свои слова назад, Ваша Светлость. Этот мир только что обрел ценность и любопытные перспективы".
"I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."
languages.original_text: "Беру свои слова назад, Ваша Светлость. Этот мир только что обрел ценность и любопытные перспективы".

traits.locale_text: "I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."
"I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."
"I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."

languages.text: 「私の言葉は取り消します、御{mf|殿|女}様。この世界は価値が上がり、興味深い展望が得られました」
languages.original_text: "I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."

languages.text: "Sözlerimi geri alıyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bu dünyanın değeri az önce arttı, bazı ilginç beklentiler söz konusu."
languages.original_text: "I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."

traits.locale_text: "Sözlerimi geri alıyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bu dünyanın değeri az önce arttı, bazı ilginç beklentiler söz konusu."

languages.text: “大人，我收回之前的话。这个世界的价值不菲，并且呈现出某些耐人寻味的前景。”
languages.original_text: "I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."

traits.locale_text: “大人，我收回之前的话。这个世界的价值不菲，并且呈现出某些耐人寻味的前景。”

languages.text: "Ich nehme meine Worte zurück, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Diese Welt hat gerade an Wert gewonnen und uns einige interessante Rekruten beschert."
languages.original_text: "I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."

traits.locale_text: "Ich nehme meine Worte zurück, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Diese Welt hat gerade an Wert gewonnen und uns einige interessante Rekruten beschert."

languages.text: « Je retire ce que j'ai dit, Votre Seigneurie. La valeur de ce monde vient de grimper en flèche et les perspectives à la clé sont des plus alléchantes. »
languages.original_text: "I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."

traits.locale_text: « Je retire ce que j'ai dit, Votre Seigneurie. La valeur de ce monde vient de grimper en flèche et les perspectives à la clé sont des plus alléchantes. »

languages.text: «Retiro lo dicho, mi{mf|lord|lady}. El valor de este mundo acaba de aumentar y las perspectivas son muy interesantes».
languages.original_text: "I rescind my words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. This world has just risen in value and gained some interesting prospects."

traits.locale_text: «Retiro lo dicho, mi{mf|lord|lady}. El valor de este mundo acaba de aumentar y las perspectivas son muy interesantes».
